label: Livsmedelsframställning
description: Branschspecifik scaffold för livsmedelsframställning med fokus på produkter, tillverkning, återförsäljare och kontakt/offert.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende kring råvaror och produktion

routes.purpose: Presentera varumärket, produktkategorierna och det viktigaste erbjudandet med tydlig väg till produkter eller offert.
Visa produktutbudet med konkreta produkter, användningsområden, förpackningar och information som hjälper återförsäljare eller kunder vidare.
Hjälpa besökare att hitta butiker, återförsäljare eller försäljningsställen där produkterna finns.
Bygga förtroende genom att berätta om verksamheten, råvarorna, hantverket och hur produktionen går till.
Fånga upp offertförfrågningar, återförsäljarkontakter och allmänna frågor via tydliga kontaktvägar.

routes.when: när företaget vill fördjupa information om tillverkningsprocess, råvaruhantering eller kvalitetssätt utöver om-sidan
när starkt bildmaterial från produktion, råvaror eller färdiga produkter behöver en egen visuell sida

sectionOrderRules: Hero must include brand name, what the producer makes and a primary CTA to /produkter or /kontakt.
Product-category-preview must show real categories or flagship products, not generic placeholder cards.
Trust-proof must only mention concrete signals such as local sourcing, egenkontroll or retailer availability when actually relevant to the business.
Quote-cta should be framed for realistic next steps such as offert, återförsäljarkontakt or product inquiry.
Products-intro must explain what defines the assortment, such as type of food, production style, audience or packaging format.
Product-grid items must be concrete products or product families with image, name and useful facts when available.
Product-details-notes should cover relevant facts such as ingredients focus, storage, packaging sizes or serving suggestions without making unsupported claims.
Pricing-table is optional and should only be used when the business publicly shares prices or package levels.
Reseller-list must contain actual sales locations, areas or partner names when available, not placeholder geography.
Map should only be shown when there is meaningful location data for a shop, factory outlet or reseller cluster.
Contact-cta should help visitors who cannot find a nearby retailer or want to become a reseller.
About-story must be specific to the company, its products and its way of working.
Production-process should describe real steps or principles in sourcing, preparation, manufacturing or delivery at a truthful level of detail.
Values must be concrete and tied to actual choices, such as ingredient quality, local suppliers or small-batch production.
Contact-info must include real contact paths such as email, phone or address where available.
Contact-form should be suitable for offert, retailer inquiry or product questions.
Map and opening-hours should only appear when the business has a relevant public location or pickup point.

mustPass: Routes and section ids use kebab-case slugs.
Page set reflects food production needs with products and reseller discovery, not restaurant booking logic.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Copy stays factual and avoids invented certifications, volumes or retailer counts.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: restaurant-specific booking flow as a default for manufacturers
generic e-commerce filler without concrete product context
placeholder reseller entries or fake stockists
claims about certifications, allergens, origin or sustainability that the business has not provided
overstating direct online checkout if the site mainly supports inquiries or retailer-led sales

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Livsmedelsframställning, matproducent, småskalig produktion, råvaror, förädling, produkter, sortiment, återförsäljare, offert, kontakt, tillverkning, lokala råvaror, kvalitet, leverans.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the business primarily makes or processes food products rather than serving restaurant meals on site.
Prefer this scaffold when reseller information, production trust and product assortment are more important than booking tables.
Suitable for bakeries, jam makers, beverage producers without alcohol-specific regulatory pages, charcuterie producers, confectionery makers and other packaged food brands.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
